created_for_phase: v1.0-RC-D Full Loop Read-only Rehearsal Implementation
loop_summary: Synthetic end-to-end rehearsal of the Owner-supervised Blackboard Loop MVP, from Owner rehearsal request through Owner decision preview, Worker dry-run, OpenClaw mock gateway, synthetic Result Message, Result Feedback Display, Hermes advisory readback, Follow-up Suggestion Guard, to final Owner Review summary. Entirely synthetic, local-only, read-only, and dry-run; no real execution occurs anywhere in this rehearsal.

timeline.synthetic_input: Owner explicitly requests a synthetic full-loop rehearsal.
timeline.allowed_behavior: record the request as a synthetic starting point for the rehearsal
timeline.forbidden_behavior: treating this request as authorization for any real execution
timeline.notes: no external side effects; no production data; no secrets; no connector call; no Blackboard write; no queue write; no audit trail write; no Worker dispatch; no OpenClaw call; no Hermes runtime activation; no automatic follow-up task creation

timeline.synthetic_input: synthetic task draft summary describing a hypothetical low-risk task
timeline.synthetic_output: a synthetic, unsaved task draft object; never written to Blackboard
timeline.allowed_behavior: represent a task draft in-memory for preview purposes only
timeline.forbidden_behavior: writing the draft to Blackboard or any persistent store
timeline.notes: no external side effects; no production data; no secrets; no connector call; no Blackboard write; no queue write; no audit trail write; no Worker dispatch; no OpenClaw call; no Hermes runtime activation; no automatic follow-up task creation

timeline.synthetic_output: read-only derived annotation badges describing the draft's synthetic state
timeline.allowed_behavior: derive display-only annotation from the synthetic draft
timeline.forbidden_behavior: mutating queue state or writing annotation to storage
timeline.notes: no external side effects; no production data; no secrets; no connector call; no Blackboard write; no queue write; no audit trail write; no Worker dispatch; no OpenClaw call; no Hermes runtime activation; no automatic follow-up task creation

timeline.synthetic_output: read-only readiness summary indicating whether the draft looks ready for an Owner decision preview
timeline.forbidden_behavior: granting or implying approval on the Owner's behalf
timeline.notes: no external side effects; no production data; no secrets; no connector call; no Blackboard write; no queue write; no audit trail write; no Worker dispatch; no OpenClaw call; no Hermes runtime activation; no automatic follow-up task creation

timeline.synthetic_output: a synthetic decision-preview event; not a real dispatch trigger
timeline.allowed_behavior: represent a hypothetical Owner decision (e.g. PASS/HOLD) for rehearsal purposes only
timeline.forbidden_behavior: using this decision preview to actually dispatch Worker
timeline.notes: no external side effects; no production data; no secrets; no connector call; no Blackboard write; no queue write; no audit trail write; no Worker dispatch; no OpenClaw call; no Hermes runtime activation; no automatic follow-up task creation

timeline.synthetic_output: a synthetic Worker dry-run preview object; Worker itself is never dispatched
timeline.allowed_behavior: produce a read-only dry-run preview describing what a Worker run would hypothetically look like
timeline.forbidden_behavior: actually dispatching Worker or starting the worker loop
timeline.notes: no external side effects; no production data; no secrets; no connector call; no Blackboard write; no queue write; no audit trail write; no Worker dispatch; no OpenClaw call; no Hermes runtime activation; no automatic follow-up task creation

timeline.synthetic_output: a fixed synthetic command envelope; never sent to a real OpenClaw endpoint
timeline.allowed_behavior: construct a deterministic synthetic command envelope for mock-gateway preview only
timeline.forbidden_behavior: sending this envelope to any real OpenClaw runtime
timeline.notes: no external side effects; no production data; no secrets; no connector call; no Blackboard write; no queue write; no audit trail write; no Worker dispatch; no OpenClaw call; no Hermes runtime activation; no automatic follow-up task creation

timeline.synthetic_output: a synthetic mock gateway response; no real OpenClaw call ever occurs
timeline.allowed_behavior: produce a deterministic synthetic mock gateway response for preview only
timeline.forbidden_behavior: treating the mock response as a real production gateway result
timeline.notes: no external side effects; no production data; no secrets; no connector call; no Blackboard write; no queue write; no audit trail write; no Worker dispatch; no OpenClaw call; no Hermes runtime activation; no automatic follow-up task creation

timeline.synthetic_output: a validated synthetic Result Message following the v0.9.6-A callback contract
timeline.allowed_behavior: assemble a synthetic Result Message with safe flags for downstream display
timeline.forbidden_behavior: treating the Result Message as proof of real execution success
timeline.notes: no external side effects; no production data; no secrets; no connector call; no Blackboard write; no queue write; no audit trail write; no Worker dispatch; no OpenClaw call; no Hermes runtime activation; no automatic follow-up task creation

timeline.synthetic_output: a read-only Result Feedback Display preview object (per v0.9.6-D)
timeline.allowed_behavior: render validated Result Message fields as a read-only preview
timeline.forbidden_behavior: treating the display as execution permission or a dispatch trigger
timeline.notes: no external side effects; no production data; no secrets; no connector call; no Blackboard write; no queue write; no audit trail write; no Worker dispatch; no OpenClaw call; no Hermes runtime activation; no automatic follow-up task creation

timeline.synthetic_output: a synthetic Mock Hermes advisory readback (per v0.9-E); Hermes runtime is never activated
timeline.allowed_behavior: produce advisory-only synthetic Hermes commentary on the Result Message
timeline.forbidden_behavior: activating real Hermes runtime, reading Hermes memory, or calling Hermes tools
timeline.notes: no external side effects; no production data; no secrets; no connector call; no Blackboard write; no queue write; no audit trail write; no Worker dispatch; no OpenClaw call; no Hermes runtime activation; no automatic follow-up task creation

timeline.synthetic_output: a guarded Follow-up Suggestion Message (per v0.9.6-E); never a task creation trigger
timeline.allowed_behavior: produce an advisory follow-up suggestion strictly gated by must_not_execute/requires_owner_confirmation
timeline.forbidden_behavior: automatically creating a follow-up task or dispatching any action from this suggestion
timeline.notes: no external side effects; no production data; no secrets; no connector call; no Blackboard write; no queue write; no audit trail write; no Worker dispatch; no OpenClaw call; no Hermes runtime activation; no automatic follow-up task creation

timeline.synthetic_output: a final read-only rehearsal summary presented back to the Owner for HOLD/PASS decision
timeline.allowed_behavior: summarize the full synthetic rehearsal timeline and ask the Owner to decide the next step
timeline.forbidden_behavior: treating the summary itself as an approval or as authorization for any real action
timeline.notes: no external side effects; no production data; no secrets; no connector call; no Blackboard write; no queue write; no audit trail write; no Worker dispatch; no OpenClaw call; no Hermes runtime activation; no automatic follow-up task creation

validation_expectations: every timeline step has required fields
every safety flag has a safe value
no write permission flag set true
no dispatch permission flag set true
no automatic follow-up flag set true
fail_closed_rules: Missing any required timeline step = HOLD.
Any connector call permission true = HOLD.
Any external side effect permission true = HOLD.
non_goals: no real Full Blackboard Loop execution
next_owner_review_question: Does the Owner want to proceed to v1.0-RC-E Owner Review / Safety Matrix Check, or HOLD for further architecture review?
